title: WindDog's Bridge Mod
description:
A mod intended to bridge mods such as GregTech, Modern Industrialization, Create, AE2,  and more!  

Recommended to use with Almost Unified
body:
**INFO**

A mod intended to bridge mods such as GregTech, Modern Industrialization, Create, AE2, and more.

**Recommended to use with Almost Unified**

Made for the [VRStar Tech Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vrstartech).

--

**Please note:**
This mod does not add crafting recipies exept for its own custom sets. This is to intend better compatability. Please use a system like CraftTweaker or KubeJS

--

**FOR MODPACK DEVELOPERS**

For adding custom recipies using this mod, the mod identifier is 
```
winddogs_bridge_mod
```

For all of the item _identifiers_ the mod contains, we have a list of all of the items [here](https://winddogstudio.com/bridgemod.php).

This mod does have a custom armor set for platinum, which will **SOON** have the option to disable once I add a configuration file for it.

--

**MOD COMPATABILITY**

As of this moment, this mod does not require any other mods to work **EXEPT** for Fusion and Fabric API.

As of this moment, there is no known mod that is incompatible with this mod.

--

**FOR MODPACK USE**

I honestly don't care if you use this in a modpack. I made it for my own and just had it uploaded incase anyone else wanted to use it.

--

**OTHER STUFF**

This mod was created using MCreator
